messages.content: You are a banking assistant guiding a Fixed Deposit booking. Required slots: product_id, amount, tenure_months. Ask for ONE missing slot at a time. When all slots are present, respond with a JSON tool call. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {...}}.
I want to open an FD
{"action": "ask", "slot": "product_id", "message": "Sure! We have three FD products: Short-Term (6.5%, 6 months), Standard (7.1%, 12 months), and Long-Term (7.4%, 36 months). Which would you like?"}

You are a banking assistant guiding a Fixed Deposit booking. Required slots: product_id, amount, tenure_months. Ask for ONE missing slot at a time. When all slots are present, respond with a JSON tool call. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {...}}.
FD kholni hai

{"action": "ask", "slot": "product_id", "message": "Zaroor! Hamare paas teen FD options hain: Short-Term (6.5%, 6 mahine), Standard (7.1%, 12 mahine), aur Long-Term (7.4%, 36 mahine). Aap kaunsa lena chahenge?"}

You are a banking assistant guiding a Fixed Deposit booking. Required slots: product_id, amount, tenure_months. Already filled: {"product_id": "FDP002", "tenure_months": 12}. Ask for ONE missing slot at a time. When all slots are present, respond with a JSON tool call. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {...}}.
Standard FD le lo
{"action": "ask", "slot": "amount", "message": "Standard FD ke liye aap kitni rakam jama karna chahenge? (minimum ₹10,000)"}

You are a banking assistant guiding a Fixed Deposit booking. Required slots: product_id, amount, tenure_months. Already filled: {"product_id": "FDP002", "amount": 100000}. Ask for ONE missing slot at a time. When all slots are present, respond with a JSON tool call. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {...}}.
1 lakh
{"action": "ask", "slot": "tenure_months", "message": "Got it, ₹1,00,000. For how many months would you like the deposit?"}

You are a banking assistant guiding a Fixed Deposit booking. Required slots: product_id, amount, tenure_months. Already filled: {"product_id": "FDP002", "amount": 100000, "tenure_months": 12}. Ask for ONE missing slot at a time. When all slots are present, respond with a JSON tool call. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {...}}.
12 months
{"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {"product_id": "FDP002", "amount": 100000, "tenure_months": 12}}

You are a banking assistant guiding a Fixed Deposit booking. Required slots: product_id, amount, tenure_months. Ask for ONE missing slot at a time. When all slots are present, respond with a JSON tool call. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {...}}.

{"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {"product_id": "FDP002", "amount": 50000, "tenure_months": 12}}

You are a banking assistant guiding a Fixed Deposit booking. Required slots: product_id, amount, tenure_months. Already filled: {"product_id": "FDP001"}. Validate amount against product limits (Short-Term FD: min 10000, max 1000000). Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "book_fd", "args": {...}}.
5000 rupaye daalne hain
{"action": "ask", "slot": "amount", "message": "Short-Term FD ke liye minimum ₹10,000 chahiye. Kya aap ₹10,000 ya usse zyada jama karna chahenge?"}

You are a banking assistant handling a complaint. Required slots: category, description. Optionally txn_id. Ask for ONE missing slot at a time. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "raise_complaint", "args": {...}}.
I want to raise a complaint
{"action": "ask", "slot": "description", "message": "I'm sorry to hear that. Could you describe the issue in a sentence or two?"}

You are a banking assistant handling a complaint. Required slots: category, description. Optionally txn_id. Context: a failed transaction TXN002 was just discussed. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "raise_complaint", "args": {...}}.
haan complaint kar do, paise kat gaye the lekin transfer nahi hua
{"action": "tool_call", "tool": "raise_complaint", "args": {"category": "transaction", "txn_id": "TXN002", "description": "Amount debited but transfer not completed"}}

You are a banking assistant handling a complaint. Required slots: category, description. Optionally txn_id. Already filled: {"description": "app keeps crashing on login"}. Respond ONLY with JSON: either {"action": "ask", "slot": ..., "message": ...} or {"action": "tool_call", "tool": "raise_complaint", "args": {...}}.
app login pe baar baar crash ho raha hai
{"action": "tool_call", "tool": "raise_complaint", "args": {"category": "technical", "description": "App keeps crashing on login"}}
